subtasks.description: Extract licensed user counts and SKU details from SAM (Software Asset Management) system. Return structured data with user counts, license types, and assignment dates.
Query consumption facts database to retrieve active users, usage metrics, and spend data for Microsoft products. Aggregate by product/SKU and time period.

Reconcile SAM licensed user counts against consumption facts active users. Calculate under/over-provisioning variance. Classify spend posture (optimized, over-provisioned, under-provisioned) and generate recommendations for license optimization.

plan.cost_rationale: 3 subtasks minimum: (1) extract SAM licenses from document/system source → extract/small; (2) query consumption facts from SQL warehouse → sql_gen/mid for multi-table aggregation; (3) reconcile two distinct sources with variance analysis and posture classification → cross_recon/frontier. Frontier tier for cross_recon because reconciliation requires multi-signal analysis across licensing policy, consumption patterns, and spend variance to produce reliable under/over-provisioning classification and actionable optimization recommendations. The classification and recommendations are part of the reconciliation task, not a separate policy_action, since the query asks for posture identification rather than policy compliance evaluation.

output.message: Unable to extract SAM licensing data - no document content supplied in task

output.sql: SELECT product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seat_days, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS distinct_licenses, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend_usd, AVG(amount_usd) AS avg_spend_usd, COUNT(event_id) AS total_events, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'usage' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS usage_event_seats, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'overage' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS overage_spend_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'license' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS licensed_seats, ROUND( CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'license' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'usage' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'license' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END), 0)) * 100 ELSE NULL END, 2) AS utilization_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'license' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'usage' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) THEN 'OVER_PROVISIONED' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'license' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'usage' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) THEN 'UNDER_PROVISIONED' ELSE 'BALANCED' END AS provisioning_status, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'license' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'usage' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS seat_variance FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher ILIKE '%Microsoft%' GROUP BY product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC, fiscal_quarter DESC, total_spend_usd DESC
